target.name: nasdaq_return
target.definition: Daily log return of the NASDAQ-100 index
target.forecast_timing: Predict return at day t using predictors available up to day t-1

dgs10_lag1.definition: 10-year U.S. Treasury yield lagged by one trading day

vix_lag1.definition: CBOE Volatility Index lagged by one trading day

sentiment_mean_lag1.definition: Daily mean institutional sentiment lagged by one trading day

sentiment_std_lag1.definition: Daily sentiment standard deviation lagged by one trading day

sentiment_extreme_lag1.definition: Daily extreme sentiment share/proportion lagged by one trading day
sentiment_extreme_lag1.interpretation: Share of highly positive or highly negative news sentiment

feature_design_rationale.main_design: The final empirical design uses nine RQ-aligned feature specifications. This separates the macro baseline, standalone sentiment representations, and macro-sentiment combinations used to evaluate incremental predictive value.
feature_design_rationale.why_no_single_full_combined_primary_spec: The thesis does not use one single full combined specification as the primary design because the goal is to isolate the predictive role of different sentiment representations. In particular, sentiment_std_lag1 and sentiment_extreme_lag1 are conceptually related and empirically highly correlated, so separating them improves interpretability, especially for the linear baseline. The macro_mean_std and macro_mean_extreme specifications are retained as limited combined sentiment settings for RQ3.

lag_policy.rule: All predictors are lagged by one trading day.
rationale: keep macro and sentiment timing consistent

preprocessing_rules.standardization: Fit on training data only and apply fitted parameters to validation/test data.

benchmark_status.proposal_statement: The lagged target term is mentioned in the proposal as a benchmark predictor.
benchmark_status.final_decision: The lagged target is documented as a possible benchmark idea, but it is not included in the final nine RQ-aligned primary feature specifications.
